_comment: OSCAL artifact generation config for Plane 4: Evidence → POA&M + SSP.
_comment_system_name: Human-readable system name embedded in all generated artifacts.
_comment_oscal_profile: OSCAL profile identifier stamped into the SSP envelope.
_comment_poam_include: Evidence statuses that generate a POA&M item.
Default: ['not-satisfied'] — only failed controls create POA&M entries.
Extend with 'not-applicable' to include inconclusive/excluded controls.
_comment_default_severity: Default severity applied to all POA&M items unless overridden.
SLA days: Critical=15, High=30, Medium=60, Low=90, Info=180

severity_overrides._comment: Map control_id -> severity string to override the default.

action_templates.not-applicable: Review control {control_id} — verdict inconclusive or excluded.

_comment_action_templates: Text templates for the 'recommended-action' field in POA&M items.
The literal string '{control_id}' is NOT interpolated at runtime —
the generator uses these as base text and appends the control_id separately.
